title: Painterly
description: Repaint a live image by hand. Thousands of little brush strokes are laid down following the picture's contours (perpendicular to its gradients), turning a camera feed, a dropped photo/video, the demo, or the layers below into a painting. Choose a medium — loose translucent Watercolour on paper, thick impasto Oil, smudged Charcoal, high-contrast Ink linework, or soft chalky Pastel — and dial brush size, density, stroke length and edge strength. Everything is live and mappable.
